name: PER_CONTACT_RELSHIPS_F_
description: This table store the effective dated Person-Person relationship details for a person

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Legislation code derived from Legal Entity

columns.Name: STATUTORY_DEPENDENT
columns.Comments: Identifies the person contact as dependent.

columns.Name: BENEFICIARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identifies if the relationship is beneficiary or not.

columns.Name: EXISTING_PERSON
columns.Comments: Indicate whether the contact relationship is created from an existing person

columns.Name: BONDHOLDER_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the person is a potential EE bondholder.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: CONT_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive flexfield structure defining column.

columns.Name: CONT_INFORMATION_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Oracle-reserved descriptive flexfield structure defining column.

columns.Name: CONTACT_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person identifier of second person in the relationship. Foreign key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: CONTACT_RELATIONSHIP_ID
columns.Comments: System generated part of the primary key. Surrogate key.

columns.Name: CONTACT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of relationship between the two people concerned.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: DEPENDENT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identifier if the relationship is dependent or not.

columns.Name: END_LIFE_REASON_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the reason the relationship ended. Foreign key to BEN_LER_F.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person identifier of first person in the relationship. Foreign key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: PERSONAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the relationship is a personal relationship.

columns.Name: PRIMARY_CONTACT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the second person of the relationship is the primary contact of the first person in the relationship.

columns.Name: RLTD_PER_RSDS_W_DSGNTR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the two people in the relationship live at the same address.

columns.Name: SEQUENCE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: The unique sequence number for the relationship used to identify contacts with a third party organization.

columns.Name: START_LIFE_REASON_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the reason the relationship started. Foreign key to BEN_LER_F.

columns.Name: THIRD_PARTY_PAY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the contact receives third party payments from the employee.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EMERGENCY_CONTACT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag which distinguishes emergency contacts from other types of relationship
